records.name: joint2019_initial_shared_eta_beta
records.label: 2019 initial joint USA/SWE
records.description: Initial joint 2019 period fit. Shared eta and beta; country-specific epsilon, Xc, Xc heterogeneity, and h_ext factors.

records.name: seq2019_usa_first_then_sweden_70_100
records.label: 2019 sequential 70-100
records.description: USA was fit first, then Sweden was fit after fixing USA eta and beta.

records.name: joint2019_shared_eta_beta_epsilon_60_100
records.label: 2019 shared eta/beta/epsilon 60-100
records.description: Joint USA/Sweden 2019 period fit. Shared eta, beta, epsilon; only Xc and Xc heterogeneity differ by country.

records.name: joint2019_shared_eta_beta_epsilon_65_100_n100k
records.label: 2019 shared eta/beta/epsilon 65-100 n100k
records.description: Joint USA/Sweden 2019 period refit using n=100000 during optimization and age focus 65-100.

records.name: joint2019_tail90_sweden_emphasis
records.label: 2019 tail90 Sweden emphasis
records.description: Joint 65-100 fit with extra Sweden age 88-96 hazard weight to improve the Sweden age-90 hazard.

records.name: hybrid2019_swe_tail90_usa_refit
records.label: 2019 hybrid SWE tail90 plus USA refit
records.description: Hybrid model: keep the good Sweden tail90/shared fit, then refit only USA Xc and Xc heterogeneity.

records.name: swehist_cohort1900_fixed_eta_beta
records.label: SWE cohort 1900 fixed eta/beta
records.description: Sweden 1900 cohort fit with eta and beta fixed from the 2019 hybrid model; fitted epsilon, Xc, Xc heterogeneity, and h_ext.

records.name: swehist_cohort1920_fixed_eta_beta
records.label: SWE cohort 1920 fixed eta/beta
records.description: Sweden 1920 cohort fit with eta and beta fixed from the 2019 hybrid model; fitted epsilon, Xc, Xc heterogeneity, and h_ext.

records.name: swehist_period1900_fixed_eta_beta_attempt
records.label: SWE period 1900 fixed eta/beta attempt
records.description: Sweden 1900 period fit was started with eta and beta fixed, fitting epsilon, Xc, Xc heterogeneity, and h_ext, but was interrupted before final output files were written.
